We Care

We are passionate about what we do and we take great pride in every project completed.
2

In Business Since 1990

You can be rest assured we’re veterans in the field and experts at what we do.
3

Highly Experienced and Competent Workforce

We take our training seriously and we stay in tune with the latest technology and waves of change the industry.
4

Proven Track Record and 100% Successful Project Completion

100% successful project completion, 100% client satisfaction.

ABOUT OUR

CORPORATION

_

Wira Ukur Consultant (WUC) with access to extensive resources, qualified and experienced technical staffs, are able to handle survey and mapping projects of any scale. Our team is well trained and equipped to provide solutions to various projects of any variability.

We have developed strong links with major construction, mapping and governmental entities performing all aspects of survey and mapping works. Our services are supported by advanced project management and latest technologies available. You will be in more than great hands at Wira Ukur Consultant (WUC).

We have established ourselves as one of the leading geomatics and land survey companies in Malaysia. We operate via two offices strategically located in Kuala Lumpur and Kota Bharu, Kelantan that provide fast and efficient project delivery. We pride ourselves in being able to offer our clients complete solutions to their needs.

Our Services

SEE WHAT WE OFFER

OUR SERVICES

_
  • Cadastral Survey
  • Engineering Survey
  • Remote Sensing
  • Construction Survey
  • Hydrographic Survey
  • Underground Utilities Detection and Survey
  • UAV & Aerial Survey and Inspection
  • Terrestrial and Airborne LIDAR / Laser Scanning
  • Data Analytics and Geographic Information System (GIS)
  • 3D Modelling and Building Information Modelling (BIM)
  • Geospatial and Mapping Project Management and Consultancy
  • Structural and Environmental Monitoring
